The '''''Star Lady''''' was a modified [[YT-2400 light freighter/Legends|YT-2400 light freighter]] and the ship of the con-artist duo [[Fenig Nabon]] and [[Ghitsa Dogder]]. It was in the [[Drydock/Legends|drydocks]] of [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] when Fen and Ghits teamed with [[Shada D'ukal]] to deliver [[Clan Shak]] females to [[Durga Besadii Tai|Durga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].
